raw_transcript_text:
DOCTOR: Ji, namaste. Kya problem hai, aapko?

PATIENT: Namaste sir. Do din se tez bukhar aa raha hai. Sar bhi bahut dard kar raha hai.

DOCTOR: Haan, haan. Temperature kitna hai? Check kiya?

PATIENT: Ji, kal ek baar 102 tha. Dolo liya toh thoda kam hua, phir aaj subah phir se 101 aa gaya.

DOCTOR: Theek hai. Aur koi problem? Gala mein dard hai? Khansi?

PATIENT: Haan sir, gala bhi thoda kharaash ho raha hai. Kabhi kabhi khansi bhi aati hai, lekin kuch nikalta nahi.

DOCTOR: Hmm. Throat ka infection hai lagta hai viral hai. Bina pyaas ke paani peena? Khoon ka pressure to nahi hai?

PATIENT: Nahi sir, BP toh kabhi nahi raha. Par aaj subah thoda chakkar aaya uth te waqt.

DOCTOR: Theek hai, pehle vital check karte hain. Dekhte hain BP kitna hai.

PATIENT: Haan sir, aap dekhen.

DOCTOR: Aapka BP 118/78 hai — normal hai. Pulse 92 hai, thoda fast hai bukhar ki wajah se. SpO2 99 hai, theek hai. Aaiye, let ke main throat dekh loon.

PATIENT: Ji.

DOCTOR: Muh khuliye... "Aaa" kahiye. Hmm, throat thoda red hai, tonsils bhi swollen hain par pus nahi hai. Viral URTI lag raha hai. Chest sun loon? Gehra saans le.

PATIENT: (Deep breath) Theek hai sir.

DOCTOR: Haan, chest clear hai. No wheeze. Sirf viral fever hai. Aapko koi aur medicine to nahi chal rahi? Diabetes, BP?

PATIENT: Nahi sir. Kabhi koi bimari nahi thi.

DOCTOR: Achha. Aapko Dolo-650 lena hai, haan. Chaar ghante ke gap mein, taweez dard ho toh. Sirf temperature 100 se upar ho toh. Andar se Pan-D, ek subah khaali pet, do hafte ke liye.

PATIENT: Sir, antibiotic nahi denge? Bukhar tez hai.

DOCTOR: Nahi, viral mein antibiotic kaam nahi karta. Aapko Augmentin ya Azithral faayda nahi karega. Koi baat nahi, fever do-teen din mein utar jayega. Bada aaram karna aur doodh-wala chai, adrak, tulsi ka kadha piyo.

PATIENT: Theek hai sir. Aur khane mein kya lein?

DOCTOR: Halka khana — khichdi, daal chawal, soup. Aur shelf se jo Shelcal hai wo nahi lena abhi. Feveri mein calcium waste hai. Pan-D se pet sahi rahega.

PATIENT: Sir, kaam par kab ja sakte hain? Office hai.

DOCTOR: Kam se kam 2-3 din rest lo. Agar fever nahi utra, aana. Lekin utar jayega insulin jaisa. Theek hai? Prescription likh raha hoon.

PATIENT: Ji dhanyavaad. Koi test bhi?

DOCTOR: Nahin, abhi test ki zaroorat nahi. Haan, paani khub piyo. Electrolyte drink bhi chalegi. Aur han, aapne Ecosprin liya? Fever mein nahi lena, Dolo lo.

PATIENT: Haan sir, Dolo hi liya.

DOCTOR: Chalo, theek hai. Prescription khatam karta hoon.

**Prescription:**
1. Tab Dolo-650 mg — SOS (if temp >100°F), 1 tab, 6 hourly.
2. Tab Pan-D 40 mg — 1 tab empty stomach in morning for 14 days.
3. Rest, warm fluids, avoid cold water.
4. If fever persists >72 hours or breathlessness develops — report immediately.

PATIENT: Thank you so much sir. Kal phone karke poochta hoon temperature kam hua ya nahi.

DOCTOR: Zaroor. Teleconsultation chalegi. Koi baat nahi. Take care.

soap_note.subjective: Patient reports 2 days of high-grade fever (recorded 102°F once, 101°F today after Dolo), headache, sore throat, occasional non-productive cough, and mild dizziness upon standing this morning. No history of hypertension or diabetes. No known allergies. BP was never elevated.
soap_note.objective: BP 118/78, Pulse 92, SpO2 99%. Throat erythematous with swollen tonsils, no exudates. Chest auscultation clear, no wheeze.
soap_note.assessment: Viral upper respiratory tract infection (URTI) with fever, likely viral etiology.
soap_note.plan: 1. Dolo-650 mg SOS (if temperature >100°F) 1 tablet 6 hourly. 2. Pan-D 40 mg 1 tablet empty stomach in morning for 14 days. 3. Advise rest, warm fluids, avoid cold water. 4. Recommends khichdi, dal rice, soup; avoid calcium supplements during fever. 5. If fever persists >72 hours or develops breathlessness, report immediately. 6. Teleconsultation follow-up as needed.
